title: neobartlettia sobralioides
intro: Neobartlettia sobralioides, also known as the Mexican Gold Poppy, is a flowering plant native to the deserts of northern Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant is known for its bright yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neobartlettia sobralioides include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
